questions.question: Explain the concept of multicollinearity in the context of multiple linear regression. How does it affect the interpretation of regression coefficients?
Suppose we have a scatterplot of two variables, X and Y. The relationship between X and Y appears to be a perfect positive linear relationship. What is the correlation coefficient of X and Y?

A researcher wants to test the relationship between the amount of sleep (in hours) and the level of alertness (on a scale of 1-10). Assuming the data is normally distributed, what type of regression analysis would you recommend using?
